_about: This kit's own versioning posture for tools/check-versioning.mjs (CANON-VERSIONING-001). The dev-kit ships NO deployed app and publishes NO package — it is a governance supra-repo consumed by fork. Its canon docs (sequential NNN) and tools (tools/versions.json, check-tool-versions) have their own gates. So apps + packages are a conscious N-A here; the instrument's teeth bite in the CONSUMERS (apps like the workbench). See tools/versioning.config.example.json for a wired consumer.

apps._na: the dev-kit is not a deployed app

packages._na: the dev-kit publishes no package; it is consumed by fork
